module.name: SIPSTATION
module.description: This module is used to configure, manage and troubleshoot your SIPSTATION(tm) FreePBX.com SIP trunks and DIDs. The license on this source code is NOT GPL Open Source, it is a proprietary Free to Use license.
module.changelog: *15.0.4.2* dont delete key automatically if BADKEY is sent *15.0.4.1* Fix backup and restore *15.0.4* SIPStation Module Doesnt honor status from KATANA API *15.0.3.5* SIPStation Module Doesn't honor status from KATANA API *15.0.3.4* fixing legacy restore *15.0.3.3* backup and restore *15.0.3.1* FREEPBX-15555 Exception Asterisk is not connected error issue fix *15.0.3* Feature/bckrstr *15.0.2* Packaging of ver 15.0.2 *13.0.14.9* Change trunk names *13.0.14.8* FREEPBX-16783 *13.0.14.7* FREEPBX-16792 *13.0.14.6* FREEPBX-16806 fix oobe page *13.0.14.5* Reset URL on install *13.0.14.4* Inital PJSIP support *13.0.14.3* FREEPBX-16668 Fix function names. *13.0.14.2* Resolve api limitation *13.0.14.1* Refreshing SMS should not timeout *13.0.14* Overhaul backend for API changes *13.0.13.27* FREEPBX-15543 Formatting breaks when ecid is false *13.0.13.26* Upgrade to version 1.0.3 of SIPStation API *13.0.13.25* FREEPBX-15543 QA Fix formatting in the failover table *13.0.13.24* Bug fix in refresh script *13.0.13.23* API updates for sms *13.0.13.22* Speed up sms polling in UCP by over 100% *13.0.13.21* FREEPBX-15757 - show the apply changes button when we need the dialplan, FREEPBX-15543 Fix emergencycid update, FREEPBX-15568 Fix areacode update, FREEPBX-14586 Fix whoops on rapid refresh *13.0.13.20* Update API calls *13.0.13.19* FREEPBX-15013 (FREEI-356), SIP-1215 *13.0.13.18* FREEPBX-15001 Seperate classes in UI for GW1 and GW2 *13.0.13.17* FREEPBX-14795 Fix online polling *13.0.13.16* Add trunk groups *13.0.13.15* FREEPBX-14569 Add an outdated message *13.0.13.14* FREEPBX-14076 fix issue with javascript dependency changing in newer versions *13.0.13.13* Update languages *13.0.13.12* Make sure API actually HAS messages, else use Asterisk *13.0.13.11* Use new API *13.0.13.10* Support for MMS Services *13.0.13.9* Use correct class declarations *13.0.13.8* SMS Adaptor needs to be static *13.0.13.7* FREEPBX-11094 FREEPBX-11031 *13.0.13.4* FREEPBX-11180 *13.0.13.3* Dashboard notice about DID routing *13.0.13.2* Fix double send *13.0.13.1* Fix debug parameter *13.0.13* Fix permission management in User Manager *13.0.12* Add ajax feedback toast *13.0.11* SMS Fixes *13.0.10* FREEPBX-9748 Cannot save Global Failover number within the SIPSTATION module *13.0.9* FREEPBX-9792 cleanup views and fix functionality when changing pages *13.0.8* Fixed bug with SMS *13.0.7* During uninstall check to make sure we are connected to astman properly *13.0.6* Allow uninstall and disable *13.0.5* FREEPBX-9565 Grammar and spelling updates. *13.0.4* FREEPBX-9501 Error page when enabling SMS for a user in User Management *13.0.3* Numerous fixes *13.0.2* SMS settings in inbound routes
